hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/skeletor/DEV/claude-apps/adhdaf && uv run pytest -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; true
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.py$'; then uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; true
